title: Lord Sheraton Leather Eco Wipes – 100% Biodegradable, Clean & Shine, Nourishes & Protects – Quick, Easy & Effective Leather Care for Furniture, Car Seats, Bags & Shoes
features: Instant Leather Refresh: Lord Sheraton wipes effortlessly remove dirt, grime, and stains, instantly revitalizing your leather items with a clean and polished finish.
24 Wipes for Ongoing Maintenance: This pack ensures long-lasting care, allowing you to consistently keep your leather goods in top-notch condition for an extended period.
Convenience in Every Swipe - ADD TO CART now: The easy-to-use wipes make leather care a breeze, providing a quick solution for busy lifestyles, ideal for on-the-go freshness.
Protective Shine and UV Defense: Not only do these wipes clean, but they also leave behind a protective shine, guarding against UV damage and preserving the luster of your leather.
Versatile Leather Compatibility: Suitable for a variety of leather surfaces, from furniture to car interiors, Lord Sheraton wipes offer universal leather care with a single wipe.
description: From the manufacturer Lord Sheraton Wood and Leather Care Lord Sheraton offers a range of high-quality care products for leather and wood surfaces. The Wood Care Range includes the Wood Balsam, made from pure beeswax, pine turpentine, and linseed oil, providing intensive care for wooden surfaces. This traditional formula nourishes and cleans wood furniture, offering lasting shine and protection without water or synthetic waxes. In addition to wood care, Lord Sheraton offers Leather Balsam and Leather Shine Spray for leather items. These products are crafted with natural ingredients to rejuvenate, protect, and enhance the beauty of both wood and leather surfaces effectively. Lord Sheraton's commitment to quality ensures that their products maintain the appearance and longevity of furniture and belongings. Lord Sheraton Leather Clean and Shine Wipes Lord Sheraton Leather Clean & Shine Wipes are ideal for everyday cleaning. Easy-to-use, they will keep your leather furniture in perfect condition in between more intensive cleaning. Leather Clean & Shine Wipes contain beeswax which gives long lasting protection, and aloe vera, to nourish and condition your furniture. How to use: Wipe across the surface of leather to remove dust, finger marks and grime. Close pack carefully after use. Always check that the wipes are compatible with the item by testing on an inconspicuous area before treating the whole item, checking for any changes to the appearance and texture. Dispose of wipes in a suitable way; never flush wipes down a toilet. Where would I use this? Easy to use for everyday cleaning Contains beewax and aloe vera
